decisions.question: Use relaycast 1.1.0 SDK helpers for RelayCast bridge and client plumbing
decisions.chosen: Use relaycast 1.1.0 SDK helpers for RelayCast bridge and client plumbing
decisions.reasoning: SDK v1.1.0 now owns raw websocket event delivery, inbound event and command normalization, identity comparison, registered-agent client creation, channel ensure/join behavior, and DM participant caching; keeping those in Relay duplicated SDK behavior and made wire-shape changes harder to absorb.
